title: Senior Software Engineer - Shaadi.com - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Shaadi.com - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Senior Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
